title: Delhi High Court asks Dr Reddy’s to halt ‘Olymviq’ sales after Novo Nordisk says it sounds like Ozempic
description: The Delhi High Court on Wednesday asked Dr Reddy’s Laboratories to not proceed with further sale or market expansion of its diabetes drug under the mark “Olymviq”, after finding prima facie phonetic similarity with Novo Nordisk’s drug Ozempic. (Novo Nordisk v. Dr Reddy's)The direction was issued orally by Justice Jyoti Singh during the hearing, while considering Novo Nordisk’s plea alleging trademark infringement and passing off.“According to me, there is a phonetic similarity…and in a pharma, i
